_comment: External oracle for the pinned rfc8785 encoder (ADR-0013; stack.md §4). SHA-256 digests of the JCS canonical bytes, produced byte-identically by four independent implementations (Python rfc8785 0.1.4, Node canonicalize 3.0.0, Go gowebpki/jcs v1.0.1, Rust serde_jcs 0.1.0) in the T-000 spike. v3 must equal v2 (key-order invariance). These are conformance vectors, never regenerated from the engine under test.
